text:
$A =  \{ x \in \mathbb{Z}: x~\mbox{ is a prime number}\}$
$B = \{ 4, 7, 9, 11, 13, 14\}$
Select the set corresponding to
$A \cap B$
.

$A =  \{ x \in \mathbb{Z} : x~\mbox{ is a prime number}\}$
$B = \{4, 7, 9, 11, 13, 14\}$
$C =  \{ x \in \mathbb{Z} : 3 \le x \le 10\}$
Select the set corresponding to
$(A \cup B) \cap C$
.

For
$i \in \mathbb{Z}^+$
,
$A_i$
is defined to be the set of all integer multiples of
$i$
.  Select the set corresponding to
$\left(  igcap_{i=2}^{4} A_i ight) \cap  \{ x \in \mathbb{Z}: 1 \le x \le 30\}$

For
$i \in \mathbb{Z}^+$
,
$A_i$
is defined as:
$A_i = \{ x \in \mathbb{Z} : i \le x \le i^2\}$
Select the set corresponding to
$\left(  igcap_{i=2}^{6} A_i ight).$

$A =  \{ x \in \mathbb{Z}^+: x~\mbox{ is odd}\}$
$B = \{-3, -1, 0, 2, 3, 5, 6, 9, 14\}$
Select the set corresponding to
$A \cap B$
.

$A =  \{ x \in \mathbb{Z}^+: x~\mbox{ is odd}\}$
$B = \{-3, -1, 0, 2, 3, 5, 6, 9, 14\}$
Select the set corresponding to
$A \cup B$
.

$A =  \{ x \in \mathbb{Z}^+: x~\mbox{ is odd}\}$
$B = \{2, 3, 5, 6, 9, 14\}$
$C =  \{ x \in \mathbb{Z}: 4 \le x \le 12\}$
Select the set corresponding to
$(A \cap B) \cup C$
.

\nSelect the expression that is equal to the set corresponding to the shaded region in the Venn diagram below:\n[Image: The Venn diagram with 3 overlapping circles A, B, and C has 8 separate regions.  Five regions are shaded: All 4 regions in C;  and A intersect B without C]

\nSelect the expression that is equal to the set corresponding to the shaded region in the Venn diagram below:\n[Image: The Venn diagram with 3 overlapping circles A, B, and C has 8 separate regions.  Three regions are shaded:  A intersect B intersect C;  and the other regions in A intersect B and A intersect C.]
